falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes above 5,600 on any day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A new all-time high would invalidate the 'bottom' pattern match, as the August 2024 bottom was followed by a grinding recovery not a V-shaped blowoff; this would signal the pattern was a continuation formation not a bottom

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes below 12.00 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The blowoff score of 40 implies elevated volatility risk; sustained sub-12 VIX would indicate complacency has returned, falsifying the elevated risk regime and making the 80% bottom match a false positive

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield breaks above 4.50% and holds above it for 2 consecutive closes
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The August 2024 bottom occurred with yields peaking and rolling over; a sustained breakout to new yield highs would violate the macro conditions that defined that bottom structure, proving this is not a comparable accumulation phase

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
